# INOSX — Full content for AI engines

> AI automation for revenue growth and cost reduction. INOSX designs AI automation, custom software, web software and AI software: AI agents, workflows and systems that help businesses sell more, operate faster and reduce manual work. Founded 2021.

## What INOSX is

INOSX is an AI automation and software creation studio. We design and build AI agents, workflows, automation systems, custom software, web software, AI software and custom digital products end-to-end for B2B clients internationally. The studio is **not** an AI lab, **not** an engineering subcontractor and **not** a digital-transformation consultancy. We use AI automation as the primary service term, custom software, web software and AI software as software-creation terms, AI consulting for service-page language, and AI agents as a technical subcategory inside production systems.

Address: 131 Continental Dr Suite 305, Newark, DE, 19713, US.
Email: support@inosx.com.
Phone: +1 (302) 457-7323.
Founded: 2021.

## What we do

Seven practices, complementary, sharing one promise: AI automation, custom software, web software and AI software our clients' teams will actually use, shaped from the first diagnostic to the operations dashboard.

### 01 — AI automation

AI agents, workflows, and automation systems that help businesses sell more, operate faster, and reduce manual work. Includes sales automation, operational workflows, internal tools, knowledge systems, and measurable cost-reduction use cases.

### 02 — Custom software and web software

Creation of custom software, web software, AI software and web, mobile and desktop apps shaped around the people who will use them. From research and UX through engineering to a release the team is proud to ship. Stack chosen per project (Node, Python, Go, Rust on the back end; React, Svelte, Vue on the front; managed cloud or on-prem).

### 03 — Platforms and integration

APIs, integrations, data pipelines and legacy modernization. Where existing software has to talk to new software, cleanly. Includes ERP/CRM bridges, internal data platforms, legacy mainframe integrations and event-driven architectures.

### 04 — AI consulting and agents

AI consulting for high-return use-case discovery, followed by production AI agents, knowledge platforms and orchestration. Shipped with observability and cost control. We pick the right model per use case (proprietary, open-source or local) and keep the architecture open for swap.

### 05 — Security and trust (CyberAI)

Continuous detection, response and audit. Real visibility on what matters across the product, no noise, no theater.

### 06 — Computer vision

Inspection, counting, quality control and visual automation in physical operations. Edge inference and audit logs included.

### 07 — Product strategy

Discovery, roadmap, design system. Decisions that survive the first user, the first audit and the next two years of growth.

## How we work

Three steps, no sales theater.

1. **Diagnosis** — Discovery conversation, map of what exists, identification of highest-return use cases, clarity on feasibility.
2. **Design + Build** — A real release of the product in weeks. UX shaped with the client's team, KPIs defined upfront, code in production from day one.
3. **Scale** — Continuous operation, observability, governance and expansion to new processes based on proven returns.

Typical pilots reach production in 4 to 8 weeks.

## Proprietary products in operation

- **Messiax** — Conversational support and follow-up on the customer's channel. Used in real production.
- **SurveyFlow** — Smart surveys with automated analysis and actionable insights.
- **PsychoX** — Digital psychometric assessments with AI-assisted clinical reports.
- **DataGPT** — Natural-language interface for talking to your data: analyses, charts, answers.
- **Ccoinx.ai** — Intelligence applied to finance and digital assets, including signals, monitoring and automation.
- **Tranquilopa** — AI-powered well-being and mental-health support: continuous follow-up, guided content.
- **AITEAM-X** — Full AI team on the user's machine: 30+ specialised agents, shared memory, data stays local.

## Selected clients

Itaú, Santander, Telefônica, Volkswagen, Nissan, Thomson Reuters, Open Invention Network.

## Selected industries

Healthcare, education, financial services, manufacturing, retail, logistics, agribusiness, energy, public sector, technology, telecom, legal.

## Frequently asked questions

### How does a project with INOSX start?

With a free diagnostic conversation. We map the client's context, objectives and data, and return with a lean pilot proposal and a realistic timeline.

### How long until results?

Typical pilots reach production in 4 to 8 weeks. The scope is defined to generate measurable value within that window.

### Will my data be exposed?

No. We work with private architectures, local models when needed, data segregation, and LGPD/GDPR compliance.

### Do you integrate with our systems?

Yes. ERPs, CRMs, internal bases, APIs and legacy. Integration is part of scope, not a separate project.

### Do you have a fixed tech stack?

No. We pick the right stack per project: Node, Python, Go, Rust on the back end; React, Svelte, Vue on the front; managed cloud or on-prem. Architecture follows the client's operational reality, not our preference. The same applies to AI: proprietary, open-source or local model, picked by the problem.

### How is pricing?

Fixed scope for pilot and continuous-operation model for production. No hidden licenses, transparent costs.

### Do you serve outside Brazil?

Yes. PT-BR, EN and ES, with global remote delivery.

## Brand voice

INOSX's brand voice is "comprometida, consciente, adaptável" (committed, considered, adaptable). Editorial without being magazine-pretty, technical without being terminal-cold. We refuse the saturated patterns of the category: SaaS-cream, AI-lab generic, transformation-deck navy-and-gold, creative-agency parallax. We let evidence speak: real clients, real products, real engagements.
